dates.summary: Google added Webhooks to the Gemini API, giving developers a native way to handle long-running jobs without polling and making Gemini easier to integrate into production workflows. AWS expanded its enterprise AI stack with Amazon Quick dashboard generation from natural-language prompts and SageMaker AI capacity-aware instance fallback for inference endpoints. ByteDance Seed also surfaced new model artifacts, including Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview and a Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, signaling continued competition in multimodal and speech systems.
